title: How To Protect Music From AI Misuse: Art Of AI Music Malware
text:
Discover how some are using AI to infiltrate music platforms, potentially sidelining human artists. This video reveals the unsettling tactics and how to fight back. Learn how to protect music from AI misuse.
How To Protect Music From AI Misuse: The Art Of AI Music Malware
Benn Jordan explores methods to protect music from
AI misuse
.
This video details encoding techniques that render music files unusable for AI training, impacting data quality. Learn how adversarial noise and other methods challenge generative AI.
by
Benn Jordan
via
Youtube
